tasks.title: Auto-fill URL from clipboard on launch
tasks.description: Read clipboard text on app boot, validate YouTube watch URL, and prefill URL input when valid.
acceptance_criteria: Tests are written first and fail before implementation
Clipboard parser accepts youtube watch URLs and rejects non-watch URLs
Renderer pre-fills URL field only when parser returns valid

tasks.title: Open output folder button after success
tasks.description: Expose open-folder action in UI once a clip is saved.
acceptance_criteria: Tests first for output path helper and IPC call mapping
Button appears after successful clip save

tasks.title: Recent save folders dropdown (max 5)
tasks.description: Persist and show last five unique save folders.
acceptance_criteria: Tests first for LRU recents behavior

tasks.title: Queue clip jobs
tasks.description: Allow multiple submits and process sequentially.
acceptance_criteria: Tests first for queue ordering and state transitions
Multiple queued jobs execute in FIFO order

tasks.title: Progress and ETA in UI
tasks.description: Parse yt-dlp output and stream progress updates.
acceptance_criteria: Tests first for progress line parsing
UI shows percentage and ETA when available

tasks.title: Persist recent job history (max 50)
tasks.description: Save recent runs for audit and debugging.
acceptance_criteria: Tests first for bounded history persistence
History includes timestamps, input URL, output path, result

tasks.title: Retry transient failures once
tasks.description: Retry one time for recognized transient failure classes.
acceptance_criteria: Only transient errors trigger one retry
Final failure is reported with both attempts context

tasks.title: Remove legacy web wrapper files
tasks.description: Remove public/ and server.js once desktop parity is complete.
acceptance_criteria: No runtime references to removed files

tasks.title: Expand IPC tests and add smoke test
tasks.description: Increase confidence around main process handlers and command generation.
acceptance_criteria: Tests first for IPC contract behavior
Smoke test validates happy-path command assembly with mocked spawn

tasks.title: Add optional auto-update check
tasks.description: Poll GitHub Releases metadata and notify users of updates.
acceptance_criteria: Tests first for feed URL resolution/fallback
